Operation 'getshopinfo' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_context. The original summary 'Get shop rating info' is vague and doesn't clearly indicate what specific metrics are returned. The description, while mentioning reviews and rating, lacks context about the response structure, use case, and what an AI agent should expect. Enhanced version clarifies the operation returns aggregated statistics, specifies the response schema type, and explains the business value for AI agent decision-making about when to use this operation.

data.current_description: Retrieve the number of reviews and average rating for your shop.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve shop review statistics and ratings
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves aggregated review statistics for your shop, including the total number of reviews and average rating score. This operation provides key metrics for understanding your shop's overall customer satisfaction and review volume. No authentication parameters required beyond API key. Returns a ShopInfoResponse object containing review count and average rating data.
data.reasoning: The original summary 'Get shop rating info' is vague and doesn't clearly indicate what specific metrics are returned. The description, while mentioning reviews and rating, lacks context about the response structure, use case, and what an AI agent should expect. Enhanced version clarifies the operation returns aggregated statistics, specifies the response schema type, and explains the business value for AI agent decision-making about when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'createorders' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks clarity on inputs (what order data is required), outputs (what is returned), and side effects (email sending behavior). Enhanced version specifies the synchronization purpose, expected input format, return value, and the automatic email workflow triggered by order creation.

data.current_description: Create orders at Revi. Once orders are synchronized, the platform will start sending review emails.
data.description_suggestion: Synchronize orders with the Revi platform to enable review email campaigns. Accepts an array of order objects containing order details, customer information, and purchase data. Returns confirmation of synchronized orders. Once created, orders transition to 'pending' status and the platform begins sending review request emails to customers.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity on inputs (what order data is required), outputs (what is returned), and side effects (email sending behavior). Enhanced version specifies the synchronization purpose, expected input format, return value, and the automatic email workflow triggered by order creation.

message: Operation 'updateordersstatus' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is adequate, but description needs clarification on inputs (order IDs and status values), outputs (what confirmation is returned), and the relationship between status changes and email delivery. Enhanced version provides specific examples and clearer workflow explanation for AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Update the status of previously synchronized orders. Useful for changing orders from 'pending' to 'ready' so Revi can send review emails.
data.description_suggestion: Update the status of previously synchronized orders to control review email delivery. Accepts order IDs and new status values (e.g., 'pending' to 'ready'). Returns confirmation of updated orders. Changing an order status to 'ready' triggers the platform to send review request emails to the associated customers.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate, but description needs clarification on inputs (order IDs and status values), outputs (what confirmation is returned), and the relationship between status changes and email delivery. Enhanced version provides specific examples and clearer workflow explanation for AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Sync products with Revi so the platform can include product-specific reviews in emails.
data.description_suggestion: Synchronize product catalog with Revi to enable product-specific review collection and display. Accepts an array of product objects containing product details, SKUs, names, descriptions, and pricing information. Returns confirmation of synchronized products. Once created, products become available for linking to orders and inclusion in review request emails.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description lacks specificity about inputs (what product data is required), outputs (what is returned), and side effects (product availability for linking). Enhanced version clarifies the input format, return value, and the downstream workflow impact.

data.current_description: Retrieve reviews with optional filtering by ID range, date range, rating, product, or store.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve reviews from the Revi platform with flexible filtering capabilities. Useful for analytics, moderation, and integration with external systems.
